title: Pope Leo calls for ‘disarming’ of artificial intelligence
full_text:
Pope Leo calls for ‘disarming’ of artificial intelligence
Pope Leo calls for ‘disarming’ of artificial intelligence
Pope Leo has warned that some AI-powered weapons systems are becoming ‘practically beyond human control,’ as he called for stronger oversight in his long-awaited manifesto on the rapidly developing technology.
Published On 25 May 2026
